name: No, I'm not human...(anime version)
description:
Heyyy how are you? Welcome to try this game inspired by the game "No, I'm not human". This game continues with some anime characters. Let me know if I should add more. Also included are my two OCs, Rex and Tobil

This is my first time trying this; if you find any errors, just tell me and I'll try to fix them.

Good luck surviving 🦈🙏
creator: Rex meg
